title: Pan-Seared Flaky Fish with Korean Peas
description: A simple and flavorful dish featuring flaky fish, crispy skillet-cooked peas, and a hint of Korean spices.
instructions: Season the fish with salt and pepper.
Heat 1 tbsp of vegetable oil in a skillet over medium-high heat. Add the fish and cook for 2-3 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Transfer the fish to a baking sheet and bake in the oven for an additional 5-7 minutes.
In a separate skillet, heat the remaining 1 tbsp of vegetable oil over medium heat.
Add the frozen peas and cook, stirring occasionally, until they start to brown and crisp up.
In a small bowl, whisk together gochujang, soy sauce, and brown sugar.
Pour the sauce over the cooked peas and stir to combine.
Serve the fish with the Korean peas and enjoy!
